pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Configure the maven-compiler-plugin explicitly to use release 21.
Replace JUnit BOM and individual API/Params dependencies with the single junit-jupiter aggregator dependency.
Change the maven-surefire-plugin version from 3.3.0 to 3.2.5.
Change the maven-compiler-plugin version from 3.13.0 to 3.12.1.
Add the exec-maven-plugin to allow running the application main class directly via Maven.
Change the project groupId from com.baseby to com.baseby.os to reflect a namespace change.
Remove explicit version locking for plugins like clean, resources, jar, install, deploy, and site that are not directly configured in the build.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed pluginManagement block and unused plugins

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove project name, URL, and source encoding properties that are either defaults or no longer needed.
